course_title: PHYSICAL THERAPY EDUCCATION AND LIFESPAN LEARNING ISSUES
description: Instructional design, learning theories and styles throughout the lifespan, literacy issues, professional presentations and posters, the physical therapist as educator, professional behaviors and emotional preparation for the clinic.
